items.truncated_body_text: The risk in the current situation, then, is that the entire global security architecture has been shaken—and no one can say for sure whether this tremor is merely temporary or the beginning of a much larger tectonic shift.

items.title: Above the line..., China vs US - Intraday post (25/April)
items.description: As I mentioned in this morning’s chat, Witkoff is currently in the Kremlin.
items.truncated_body_text: As I mentioned in this morning’s chat, Witkoff is currently in the Kremlin. Fresh development: in Balashikha, Major General Yaroslav Moskalik—deputy head of the Russian General Staff’s Operations Directorate—was killed by a car bomb. Putin has not yet responded. He knows the EU is trying to derail peace talks; he’ll react in due course.

items.title: London summit - geo post, Intraday post (23/April)
items.description: Investors still don’t trust Trump, and momentum remains well inside the rangebound zone I marked. Yesterday, a flurry of TSLA calls boosted the tape and some manipulative trades tried to jack up sentiment on a few headlines—but remember: no real progress was made.
items.truncated_body_text: Investors still don’t trust Trump, and momentum remains well inside the rangebound zone I marked. Yesterday, a flurry of TSLA calls boosted the tape and some manipulative trades tried to jack up sentiment on a few headlines—but remember: no real progress was made.

items.title: Bonds, Currency market, Sentiment, Education and Study on Crises, Weekly post (21-25/April)
items.subtitle: And leaked infos at the end
items.description: And leaked infos at the end
items.truncated_body_text: On Friday, I shared an extended study of the current geopolitical situation and the processes that led us here. It’s crucial to understand this context, because the global economy—and therefore the entire market structure—is undergoing a profound transformation, and every market reaction today is driven first and foremost by the headlines.

items.title: Running out of time, US/China war (+intraday post 11/April)
items.description: Dear viewers and readers, it looks like we won’t have to wander far for our daily dose of excitement today either!
items.truncated_body_text: Dear viewers and readers, it looks like we won’t have to wander far for our daily dose of excitement today either! The US/China viagra-supercharged cockfight continues, with China in the left corner getting ready to unleash yet another round of hits, while the US in the right corner does its best to absorb every blow and pray its backers don’t throw in the towel.
